mapper.select: select period_id, tenant_id, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from scm_tenant_status_period where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by start_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant_status_period (period_id, tenant_id, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{periodId}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update scm_tenant_status_period set end_time = #{endTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = #{remark} where period_id = #{periodId}
